query:
INSERT INTO reviews (artisanId, customerId, rating, comment, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT a.id, c.id, r.rating, r.comment, 'published', NOW(), NOW()
FROM artisans a
JOIN users c ON c.openId IN ('demo-customer-001', 'demo-customer-002')
JOIN (
  SELECT 'demo-artisan-001' AS artOpenId, 5 AS rating, 'Kwame built a beautiful wardrobe for our bedroom. The finish is excellent and he delivered on time. Highly recommend!' AS comment
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-001', 5, 'Fantastic work on our kitchen cabinets. Very professional and uses quality wood. Will definitely use again.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-002', 5, 'Abena fixed our electrical fault quickly and safely. Very knowledgeable and her prices are fair.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-002', 4, 'Good work on the wiring. Came on time and cleaned up after. Would recommend to others.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-003', 5, 'Kofi sorted our bathroom plumbing in one day. No mess, no fuss. Excellent service!'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-004', 5, 'Ama made my wedding dress and it was absolutely stunning. She understood exactly what I wanted.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-004', 5, 'Best tailor in Accra! My Kente outfit for my graduation was perfect. Everyone asked who made it.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-005', 4, 'Yaw diagnosed my car problem fast and fixed it at a reasonable price. Good mechanic.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-006', 5, 'Akosua painted our entire house interior. The colour choices she suggested were perfect. Very neat work.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-007', 4, 'Kwesi made our security gate and it looks great. Strong welding and good design.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-008', 5, 'Efua tiled our bathroom beautifully. Very clean work and she finished ahead of schedule.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-009', 5, 'Nana repaired our roof before the rains came. Solid work and very professional team.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-010', 5, 'Adwoa installed our AC perfectly. It has been running smoothly for months. Great service!'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-011', 4, 'Kojo made our aluminium windows. Good quality and reasonable price for Kumasi.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-012', 5, 'Maame wove the most beautiful Kente for our family reunion. Authentic and high quality.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-013', 5, 'Fiifi installed our solar system and we have not had a power problem since. Excellent investment!'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-015', 5, 'Kwabena came to my location and fixed my car on the spot. Very convenient and professional.'
) r ON a.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId = r.artOpenId)
WHERE c.openId = 'demo-customer-001'
LIMIT 17;

  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-011', 4, 'Kojo made our aluminium windows. Good quality and reasonable price for Kumasi.'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'demo-artisan-012', 5, 'Maame wove the most beautiful Kente for our family reunion. Authentic and high quality.'
